title: Bedwars Mini Client
description: A Small But Effective Performance/QoL Modpack For 1.8.9. Great For Bedwars, Skywars, Skyblock, SheepWars & More! Built For Hypixel.
body:
A Small But Effective Performance/QoL Modpack For 1.8.9. Great For Bedwars, Skywars, Skyblock, SheepWars & More! Built For Hypixel.

# Features

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

### Preconfigured Styles
All Widgets Are Preconfigured With A Rounded Corners Style

### Quick Play
Ingame When 'X' Is Pressed A Quick Play Menu Comes Up For Quickly Joining Minigames On Hypixel

### ONECONFIG GUI

Configure All Mods In One GUI. Keybind: 'Right Shift'

![ONECONFIG](https://imgur.com/TRzhb54.png)

### Smooth GUI

Main Menu & Ingame Widgets Have Smooth/Rounded Corners

![Smooth GUI](https://imgur.com/xIpgNLP.png)

### Tabs In Chat For Hypixel Parties

Chat Is Small & Has Tabs For Easy Access To Party Chat

![Small Chat With Tabs](https://imgur.com/7aDO8h6.png)

</details>



# Mods List

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- 3D Skin Layers
- AutoGG Reimagined
- BehindYouV3
- Canelex Keystrokes Revamp
- Chatting
- ColorSaturation
- CrashPatch
- DamageTint
- Entity Culling
- EvergreenHUD
- FPS Reducer
- GlintColorizer
- Hypixel Mod API
- Hytils Reborn
- OverflowAnimations
- OverflowParticles
- PolyBlur
- PolyCrosshair
- PolyNametag
- PolyPatcher
- PolySprint
- PolyTime
- PolyWeather
- VanillaHUD
  
**Mods Since 1.0.1**
 
- ReplayMod
- QuickJoin


</details>
